overview: Expert loop usage involves vectorization, loop unrolling, parallel streams, and replacing loops with higher-order functions (map/filter/reduce).
industryContext: In data processing, loops are the primary bottleneck. Companies use loop tiling (cache efficiency), unrolling (reducing branch overhead), and parallel streams (multi-core) for throughput.

examples.title: Functional Alternative
examples.code:
// Instead of loop
const result = data.filter(x => x % 2 === 0).map(x => x * 2);
examples.explanation: Higher-order functions express intent more clearly than loops and are often optimized internally.

codeReviewChecklist: Could this loop be replaced with map/filter?
Could a different data structure eliminate the loop?

refactoringGuide.smell: Complex loop with conditionals and state mutations
refactoringGuide.solution: Extract body into pure function, use map/filter/reduce

scalability.considerations: Large loops can be parallelized using multiprocessing or worker threads. Measure before optimizing.
